content: Select the default {{aiProvider}} and model for all features across {{productName}} ({{aiAgents}}, document editors, etc.)

comment.text: This is a descriptive text explaining the purpose of selecting a default AI provider and model. It appears below the "Default AI Provider" heading in the AI settings. It contains variables for the AI provider name (e.g., "OpenAI"), AI agents (e.g., "AI Assistants"), and the product name (e.g., "ONLYOFFICE DocSpace").
